checkpoint_scope: External-signal methods investigated after 2025/26 recent-season xG closure.

EPL_FPL_CONTEXT.rejection_reason: Pre-frozen forward sample minimum not met and 1X2 proper-score paired bootstrap confidence intervals cross zero.
EPL_FPL_CONTEXT.next_clean_evidence: Untouched 2026/27 chronological shadow only; do not retune on the observed 2025/26 holdout.

CLUBELO_RESIDUAL.execution_change: History ingestion split into per-competition jobs with aggregate r2 receipt; zero-mass conditional-KL tail handling corrected before residual rerun.

GDELT_CONTEXT.superseded_result: Initial coverage polluted by HTTP 429 and not admissible for source-coverage conclusions.
GDELT_CONTEXT.execution_change: Five competitions serialized, explicit Retry-After/exponential backoff retained, per-domain timeout increased to 90 minutes.

TRANSFERMARKT_PLAYER_VALUE.reason: Complete 22-player strictly-prior valuation coverage and valuation freshness are insufficient for a unified five-league main model.

COMPLEX_PREDICTABILITY_GATE.reason: Entropy/score-concentration/total-concentration gate did not beat the existing top1-top2 probability-gap gate in strict forward validation.
